_comment: Training phrases for the 6 core intents. In Dialogflow CX, create one Intent per object below and paste the trainingPhrases. Parameters reference the custom entities in entities.json.

intents.description: User wants to know the status / location of an order
trainingPhrases: Can you check delivery for order 55512?
How do I return an item?
Can I get my money back?
I want a refund for my order

intents.description: Questions about plans, prices and billing
trainingPhrases: How much does the Pro plan cost?
What's included in the Business plan?
Do you have discounts for non-profits?
Tell me about Acme Voice Gateway
What is the SKU for the Assistant Hub?

intents.description: User asks to speak to a human / escalate
trainingPhrases: I want to talk to a human
Can I speak to a representative?
This isn't helping, get me a person
I need to file a complaint with someone

intents.description: Catch-all support question answered from the knowledge base
trainingPhrases: How do I reset my password?
Can I use it in multiple languages?
How do I change my plan?
